frontmatter.title: How to track your life
frontmatter.excerpt: Use data to improve your life.

pageProps.content:
Copy this: https://blog.doist.com/quantified-self-apps

Music: Last.fm getting data from Spotify

Tasks and goals: Todoist

Code: Wakatime

Time on cellphone and PC: RescueTime

Books: Goodreads

Articles: Pocket

Games: howlongtobeat.com

Happines: To be added

Movies and TV Shows: Trakt

Writing: Grammarly (needs to be improved where is working)

Income and Expenses: BudgetBaker

Health: Xiaomi Smart Scale (Google Fit?), add to manual sheet or google fit? the blood results

Summarize everything: Exist.io or do it manually coding fetching from the app's API's
